name: dimly lit Basement
description: I'm in a dimly lit Basement
hints: The basement! Doctor Octopus and Electro are here with printing presses. Danger!
You need web fluid to deal with the villains. WEST leads to the paper room with a gem.
WEST→room 22 (paper room with gem). UP→room 33 (duct maze). Doctor Octopus and Electro guard this area. Need web to defeat them.
notes: Basement with Doctor Octopus and Electro villains. Printing presses. WEST→room 22 (paper room, gem). UP→room 33 (duct maze). Need web fluid to defeat villains.
